meta.name: ABILITY_RESEARCH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 Tech.

Gain +1 Tech.
Bonus Passive: Crafting subtracts 1 Tech instead of all of it.

meta.name: ABILITY_DISCHARGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spend all of your mana, then deal that much electric damage to an adjacent unit.
Spend all of your mana, then deal that much electric damage to an adjacent unit with a 10% Stun chance for each point of mana spent.

meta.name: ABILITY_REPAIR_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Repair 1 use to all of your or an adjacent unit's equipment.
Repair all uses to all of your or an adjacent unit's equipment.

meta.name: ABILITY_SHODDYJETPACK_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Fly to a random tile in a large area. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).
Fly to any tile. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

meta.name: ABILITY_SPAWNDECOY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a decoy that explodes when it dies.
Spawn a decoy that explodes when it dies. When an enemy targets you, swap places with the decoy.

meta.name: ABILITY_SWITCHEROO_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Your next attack breaks your weapon, then craft a new one.
Your next attack breaks your weapon, then gain +1 Tech and craft a weapon.

meta.name: ABILITY_SPRINGSHOES_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Jump up to 2 tiles away.
Jump up to 5 tiles away.

meta.name: ABILITY_FLAMETHROWER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot a flame that inflicts Burn.

meta.name: ABILITY_AUTOPILOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Take an extra turn after this one. You are AI controlled on that turn.

You or another unit takes an extra turn after this one. That unit is AI controlled on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_RECYCLE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Destroy your weapon to gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action.
Destroy your weapon to gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action. This spell costs 1 mana if you haven't used your weapon this turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_BUILDTURRET_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Summon a turret.
Summon a rocket turret.

meta.name: ABILITY_ROCKETSKATES_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash forward in a straight line then explode dealing damage in an area (including to yourself).
Dash forward in a straight line then explode dealing damage in an larger area (including to yourself).

meta.name: ABILITY_BOMBCHUDASH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash forward in a straight line then explode.

meta.name: ABILITY_DRILLDOWN_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dig to an open tile in a straight line.
Dig to a tile in a straight line. If you dig into a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

meta.name: ABILITY_ARMORUP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Craft a Tinkerer armor piece into one of your empty armor slots.
Craft a Tinkerer armor piece into one of your or an adjacent unit's empty armor slots.

meta.name: ABILITY_FRESHOFFTHEFORGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +7 [img:shield] and Burn 3.
Give +7 [img:shield] and Burn 3 to yourself or an adjacent unit.

meta.name: ABILITY_ELECTRICNAIL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Summon a nail that arcs electricity to neighboring tiles whenever any unit spends mana.

Summon a nail that arcs electricity to neighboring tiles whenever any unit spends mana.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_CRAFT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Craft and equip a random temporary weapon.
Craft and equip a random temporary weapon for yourself or an ally in range 3 (if they have an empty weapon slot).

meta.name: ABILITY_SHOCKWAVE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal damage to all units. The closer a unit is to you the more damage it takes.

Deal damage to all units. The closer a unit is to you the more damage it takes.
[s:.7](Deals more damage to closer units and less damage to further units.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_MATH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value.
Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value. If its HP was a prime number, gain 5 mana.

meta.name: ABILITY_REPROGRAM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Conjure a random spell of your class as a bonus ability.
Conjure a random upgraded spell of your class as a bonus ability.

meta.name: ABILITY_IMPROVE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +1 to a random stat.
You or an adjacent unit gain +1 to 2 random stats.

meta.name: ABILITY_CATBOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Spawn a Catbot and give it your current weapon.
[s:.7](You will not get the weapon back)[/s]

Spawn a Catbot and give it your current weapon. Gain +1 Tech and refresh your basic action.
[s:.7](You will not get the weapon back)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_BOMBCHU_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a Bombchu bot.

Spawn a Bombchu bot in range 4.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_REMOTEDETONATOR_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Explode a familiar, dealing 5 damage with knockback in an area.

Explode a familiar, dealing 5 damage with knockback in an area.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_SHORTCIRCUIT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal 1 electric damage with a random amount of knockback (up to 3) to all adjacent units.
Deal 2 electric damage with a random amount of knockback (up to 10) to all adjacent units.

meta.name: ABILITY_ELECTROLYZE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give your weapon +3 electric damage.

Give your weapon +3 electric damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_EJECTBUTTON_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Explode and fly to a random tile at least four tiles away. This explosion damages you.

Explode and fly to a random tile at least four tiles away. This explosion damages you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_FIRECRACKERS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Throw 3 small 1-damage explosives at random tiles in an area.
Throw small 1-damage explosives at all tiles in an area.

meta.name: ABILITY_UPGRADE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Fully heal a familiar and give it All Stats Up.
Fully heal a familiar and give it All Stats Up and +1 [img:divineshield].

meta.name: ABILITY_EUREKA_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Gain +3 Tech and Madness 1.
[s:.7](This spell can only be cast once per battle.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_EUREKA_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Gain +3 Tech.
[s:.7](This spell can only be cast once per battle.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_PUNCHBOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a Rubber Fist Bot.
Spawn a Rubber Fist Bot within a large range.

meta.name: ABILITY_FASTHANDS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Refresh your weapon and trinket actions (unless they gain you mana).
Refresh your weapon and trinket actions (unless they gain you mana). Repair 1 use to all of your equipment.

meta.name: ABILITY_MECHPUNCH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash-punch with Knockback 3.

meta.name: ABILITY_MECHSUITEJECT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Launch yourself out of the mech. Deal damage to units you land on and yourself.

meta.name: ABILITY_MECHSUITBARRAGE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Fire the machine guns!

meta.name: ABILITY_MECHDASH_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Dash forward and light fires in your path.

meta.name: ABILITY_MECHSUIT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Summon a mech suit that can be piloted.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Summon a mech suit that can be piloted.

meta.name: ABILITY_UNRELIABLESHIELD_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain +6 [img:shield] and +1 temporary Brace. This spell has a 75% chance to be disabled on each turn.

Get +6 [img:shield] and +1 temporary Brace. This spell has a 66% chance to be disabled on each turn.

meta.name: ABILITY_UNRELIABLEMISSILE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot an explosive homing missile at a random enemy. This spell has a 75% chance to be disabled on each turn.

Shoot an explosive homing missile at a random enemy. This spell has a 66% chance to be disabled on each turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_SPAREPARTS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Destroy your weapon and gain one of the following: +2 [img:shield], +4 Charge, +1 Thorns, or 1 coin.
Destroy your weapon and gain one of the following: +4 [img:shield], +8 Charge, +2 Thorns, or 2 coins.

meta.name: ABILITY_SPLITTHEATOM_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Deal 50 damage to and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies. You can pay for this spell over multiple turns.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost can't be modified.)[/s]

Deal 50 damage to and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies. You can pay for this spell over multiple turns.
This spell absorbs the mana you spend casting other spells.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost can't be modified.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_EXPERIMENTALTELEPORTER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport to any tile. You have a 15% chance to equip a piece of Fly armor that breaks any armor pieces it replaces.

Teleport to any tile. You have a 15% chance to equip a piece of Fly armor that breaks any armor pieces it replaces.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

meta.name: ABILITY_SHOCKTHERAPY_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Deal 1 electric damage to yourself or an adjacent unit. Cleanse debuffs from that unit, give it a random stat up, and a 25% chance to be Stunned.
Deal 1 electric damage to yourself or a unit in range 5. Cleanse debuffs from that unit, give it a random stat up, and a 25% chance to be Stunned.

meta.name: ABILITY_BUILDNUKE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a mini-nuke that makes a HUGE explosion when it dies.
Spawn a mini-nuke in range 4 that makes a HUGE explosion when it dies.

meta.name: ABILITY_INSTANTBARRIER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Gain +6 [img:shield].
Castable only if you have no [img:shield].

Gain +6 [img:shield].
This spell's mana cost is equal to your current [img:shield].

meta.name: ABILITY_VOLTTACKLE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Teleport to anything that's electrically conductive. Displace units you teleport onto and deal electric damage to them.
Teleport to anything that's electrically conductive. Displace units you teleport onto and deal electric damage to them with a 50% chance to inflict Stun.

meta.name: ABILITY_SMASHTINKERER_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Smash your weapon onto an adjacent unit, destroying it and dealing double its damage.

Smash your weapon onto an adjacent unit, destroying it and dealing double its damage.

meta.name: ABILITY_SHEDSCRAP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Lose 1 [img:shield]. Spawn a junk pile.
Lose 1 [img:shield]. Spawn a junk pile in range 2.

meta.name: ABILITY_REPAIRARMOR_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Lose all [img:shield], then gain [img:shield] equal to your equipment's starting [img:shield].

meta.name: ABILITY_REPAIRARMOR_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Lose all [img:shield], then give [img:shield] equal to your equipment's starting [img:shield] to yourself or another ally.

meta.name: ABILITY_ROCKETRIDE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Jump to any open tile. Explode when you land. (This explosion also damages you.)

Jump to any open tile. Explode when you land. (This explosion also damages you.)

Spawn a vacuum bot that collects pickups and shares their effects with your whole team.

meta.name: ABILITY_NURSEBOT_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a nurse bot that heals allies.

Spawn a nurse bot that heals allies.

meta.name: ABILITY_TESLACOIL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Spawn a tesla coil that shoots lightning bolts at random units with a small chance to inflict Stun.
Spawn a tesla coil in range 7 that shoots lightning bolts at random units with a small chance to inflict Stun.

meta.name: ABILITY_REFINEMATERIALS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Collect a pickup in range 3. Instead of its normal effect, gain +1 Tech.
Collect a pickup in range 3. Instead of its normal effect, gain +1 Tech, +1 [img:shield], and +1 to a random stat.

meta.name: ABILITY_FABRICATE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Give an ally in range 3 a temporary copy of your weapon, if they don't have a weapon.

Give an ally in range 3 a temporary copy of your weapon, if they don't have a weapon.

meta.name: ABILITY_SPARKS_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot electric bolts at up to 3 random enemies or robots.
Shoot electric bolts at up to 5 random enemies or robots.

meta.name: ABILITY_HONE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Repair 1 use to your weapon and give it +1 damage for the rest of the battle.
Repair 1 use to your weapon and give it +1 damage for the rest of the battle. Refresh your weapon action.
